item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa prioritas masyarakat lebih penting dibandingkan hak individu, tetapi tidak semua situasi harus mengorbankan kebebasan pribadi.

notes: Agent A remains society-leaning but narrows the claim into balance and rights caveats after Agent B's U.S. individual-rights framing. Agent B stays consistently rights-first and treats personal freedoms as non-negotiable while acknowledging social-justice concerns.
